headline: Bitcoin Teeters Near $60K Amid Tech Selloff

article.title: Big Tech crash, oil volatility rattles markets: Will Bitcoin hold above $60K?

headline: Kospi Jumps 2% on Chip Stocks Rally

headline: Stocks Surge 2% on Iran Deal Hopes

article.summary: Stocks extended gains and oil fell after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran, raising expectations for a diplomatic end to the conflict that’s triggered price swings across financial markets for more than 100 days.
